docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH ALTHAUS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ILSE MICHELSON WHO IS PRESENTLY IN THE HOSPITAL AND CANNOT ATTEND TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON JUNE 24TH. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ALTHAUS, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT MICHELSON, ILSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-24-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALTHAUS, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MICHELSON, ILSE $1,410.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,460.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES, MATTER IS CONTINUE TO JUL-15-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE PROCESS. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (306). NO EXHIBIT RETAINED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH ALTHAUS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ILSE MICHELSON. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT THE 6/24/16 HEARING. FURTHERMORE, AT THE LAST CALLING OF THE CASE ON 7/15/16 THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THIS MATTER TO TODAY. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MAIL - CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT
